summary: VitalFlow Iteration 8 - All new features tested and working. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed. Features verified: (1) Navbar 'Gestao' button with correct text and external link, (2) 4-step Onboarding Tour with localStorage persistence, (3) Dashboard/HistoryChart empty states with 'Aguardando sincronizacao' and 'Conecte um dispositivo', (4) Google Fit architecture endpoints returning correct status.

frontend: Navbar 'Gestao' button text is correct (not 'Painel Administrativo')
Navbar 'Gestao' button opens in new tab (target='_blank')
Onboarding tour appears on first login (localStorage cleared)
Onboarding step 1: 'Bem-vindo ao VitalFlow' title and body
Onboarding step 2: 'Seu V-Score' with color indicators (Verde/Amarelo/Vermelho)
Onboarding step 3: 'Pontos de Energia' with gamification visual hints
Onboarding step 4: 'Conecte seu Dispositivo' with final CTA button
Onboarding 'Pular tour' skips and sets localStorage flag
Onboarding does NOT appear on subsequent logins (localStorage persists)
Dashboard empty state shows 'Conecte um dispositivo' when no data
Dashboard empty state shows gradient 'Conectar Dispositivo' CTA button
HistoryChart empty state shows 'Aguardando sincronizacao' with pulsing Radio icon
HistoryChart empty state shows 'Conectar dispositivo' button
Dashboard with data shows StatusOrb, AIAnalysis, NudgeCard, MetricBars, HistoryChart
Gamification stats bar shows energy points and streak

critical_code_review_comments: Onboarding tour uses localStorage 'vitalflow_onboarding_done' flag correctly
Empty states provide clear user guidance with CTAs to connect devices
Google Fit architecture prepared but not active (GOOGLE_FIT_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_FIT_CLIENT_SECRET empty in .env)
Navbar 'Gestao' button correctly links to external URL with target='_blank'
seed_data_creation: Created test_empty_user for empty state testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: VitalFlow Iteration 8 - All new features verified. (1) Navbar button renamed from 'Painel Administrativo' to 'Gestao' with external link to https://vitalflow.ia.br/gestor. (2) 4-step Onboarding Tour works correctly with localStorage persistence. (3) Dashboard and HistoryChart empty states show 'Aguardando sincronizacao' or 'Conecte um dispositivo' with CTAs. (4) Google Fit architecture endpoints work (/api/wearables/google-fit/status returns configured=false, /api/wearables/google-fit/auth returns 501). Admin user (admin@vitalflow.com) has analysis data so dashboard shows full content. Test empty user created for empty state testing.
